name: happyskills-sync
description: Sync local skills with the remote registry — status, pull (with rebase-style mode), diff, reconcile drift, merge-conflict resolution, and publish-after-merge intelligence.

capabilities.summary: check whether a local skill has diverged from the registry and see the differences
intents: has my skill diverged from the registry
why can't I publish, it says diverged
show the difference between my local skill and the remote
what changed locally versus the registry

capabilities.summary: pull remote changes and resolve merge conflicts
intents: sync my skill with the registry
get the latest version of a skill I authored
fix conflict markers after a pull

capabilities.summary: repair lock-versus-disk drift after an out-of-band change
intents: repair a lock versus disk mismatch
fix a skill the CLI says has drifted
restore consistency between the lock file and disk

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS
